channel.title: Apple-Silicon on TinyWeights.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Apple-Silicon on TinyWeights.dev

item.title: The Complete Guide to Running Small LLMs on Apple Silicon (2026)
item.description: Complete guide to running small language models on Apple Silicon — MLX vs Ollama, real benchmark data by chip generation, and setup commands for M1 through M5.

item.title: Fine-Tune Gemma 3 270M on Apple Silicon with MLX-LM and Python
item.description: A practical, step-by-step guide to fine-tuning Google's Gemma 3 270M on your Mac using Apple's MLX framework, LoRA, and Python.
